\documentclass[11pt,a4paper,sans]{moderncv}

% Modern CV theme - 'banking' provides a clean, professional look
\moderncvstyle{banking}
\moderncvcolor{blue}

% Custom colors for enhanced visual appeal
\usepackage{xcolor}
\definecolor{accentcolor}{RGB}{0, 83, 155}      % Deep blue for headers
\definecolor{linkcolor}{RGB}{0, 102, 204}       % Blue for links
\definecolor{sectioncolor}{RGB}{64, 64, 64}     % Dark gray for sections

% Better fonts

% Character encoding

% Page margins - slightly more generous for readability

% Enhanced packages

% Bibliography packages

\renewcommand*{\sectionstyle}[1]{{\fontsize{13}{15}\bfseries\upshape\color{accentcolor}#1}}

% Personal data
